items.title: Iran will 'definitely compete in FIFA World Cup', seeks assurances over visas for key players
items.summary: Iran demands assurances that team members who served in the Revolutionary Guard, including skipper Mehdi Taremi, will be able to get visas for the FIFA World Cup.

items.title: Kira Puru gained fame as a musician, so why have they pivoted to acting in Bad Company?
items.summary: Kira Puru is known for their triple j Hottest 100-charting energetic pop music, but this year the musician has roles in not one, but two of the biggest Australian TV shows. What's behind the pivot?

items.summary: A recently restored, hand-powered mill that revolutionised cider-making has crushed its first batch of apples in more than 100 years.

items.title: Ongoing breakdowns hamper mobile breast screening service in Tasmania, but government says fix on the way

items.title: Scientists call for offshore carcass disposal after 'disastrous' whale removal operation at Bellambi Boat Ramp
items.summary: Marine scientists want to see whale carcasses towed offshore and disposed of out to sea in a process they say is safer, cheaper and more ecologically friendly.
